**Linked backlog item**: `docs/REFACTOR_BACKLOG.md` → [section](https://github.com/may1350/lisna/blob/main/docs/REFACTOR_BACKLOG.md#now)

## What

One sentence describing the change.

## Why now

What hurts today? (Bug? Recurring confusion? Blocking a feature?)

## Touches

- `path/to/file.ts`
- ...

## Done when

- [ ] Concrete, testable
- [ ] ...

## Risks / pitfalls

Walk through `.claude/rules/pitfalls.md`. Which apply?

## Effort

S (< 1 day) | M (1-3 days) | L (> 3 days)
